use std::sync::Mutex;
use tokio::time::{sleep, Duration};

struct AppState {
    cache: Mutex<Vec<String>>,
    db_url: String,
}

impl AppState {
    async fn fetch_from_db(&self, key: &str) -> String {
        sleep(Duration::from_millis(50)).await;
        format!("data_for_{}", key)
    }
}

async fn handle_request(state: &AppState, key: &str) -> String {
    let mut guard = state.cache.lock().unwrap();
    if let Some(cached) = guard.iter().find(|s| s.as_str() == key) {
        return cached.clone();
    }
    // BAD: lock guard held across slow async DB call
    let value = state.fetch_from_db(key).await;
    guard.push(value.clone());
    value
}
